w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: When a piece attacks another piece, instead of being taken immediately, the two pieces will fight first like a Tekken game, called “Showoff”
Whatever piece is defeated, then that piece will be removed from the game even if the piece is the attacker.
Allows two players local or against AI
WASD for player 1, Arrow Keys for player 2
The life of each piece starts at:
Can deal critical damage randomly by 4% of the damage dealt.
Change title from Showoff to Showdown
Damage dealt increases by percent per piece:
Fix bug where a player during showdown cannot move forward or a move was stuck like keep on moving backward or forward even pressing the respective keys.
Add animation when attacking and blocking.
Use sprite for animations especially during showdown
a victory sign or indicator when a player wins the game (When the king is defeated).
Every 30 seconds, a random powerup or perk will spawn in the board that can be received by any piece. These perks/powerups can be:
Dance (40% spawn rate) – Allow the receiving piece to move from any directions next turn only.
Revive (15% spawn rate) – Choose a destroyed piece then return it to the board in full hp.
Restrict (10% spawn rate) – The other player cannot move a piece for 2 turns
Strength (30% spawn rate) – Boost the damage and hp of the receiving piece by 10%. It can only be used in one (1) showdown.
Smash (3% spawn rate) – Choose two (2) pieces owned by the opponent. Remove it from the board. It can only return by revive perk.
Extinct (2% spawn rate) – Destroy all pieces of the opponent and automatically wins the game.
Heal (25% spawn rate) – Heal the receiving piece by 50 hp.
Spawning of powerups now depends on turn counts. It will now spawn after a number of turn counts. The turn counts be a number from 4 – 8 counts.
Allow two players from different device to play each other by having a room or session they can play in as long as the players are using the same web link.
Update bonus damage by percent per piece:
When a critical damage occurred, make a sudden pause for 1s then show the total damage dealt by the critical damage and who dealt the damage to whom.
When a powerup is retrieved, make a sudden pause for 1s then show who has the powerup and the effect of it.
Fix issue where the other device (the one invited) is having frame drop issues during showdown
Hide the possible moves of a piece from the opponent.
Cannot target both two bishops, rooks, or horses. Only one.
When online, during showdown, add/change these following controls:
Jump – Space (applicable also in local play)
Improve the performance of the invited player’s device:
During showdown, the moves are also delayed and freezes when the showdown is over.
Only hide the possible moves of the piece from the opponent but show the selected move.
The showdown will now have total of 3 rounds. First piece to win 2 rounds wins the showdown.
The player’s piece should be shown always on the left side.
60 seconds timer. The piece with the highest health will win the round.
The movement will be now 2D only so meaning only Left, Right, and Space movements are allowed.
Can only be used in one showdown
Each piece will have an ultimate skill during showdown.
All pieces will have a capacity of
dealt, they will gain random number
mana. If the capacity is full, no mana will be earned.
The ultimate skill can be activated by clicking
“E” for online play and vs AI.
“C” for player 1 and “<” for player 2 during local play.
The ultimate progress continues throughout the whole showdown so if the piece has 50 mana, next round it will be retained.
These are the ultimate skills per piece.
Rooks – Fortify (Reduce damage received by 50% for 5 seconds)
Horses – Dash (Increase movement speed and jump height by 50% for 5 seconds)
Bishops – Blessing (Fully restore the hp of the piece)
Queens – Barrage (Launch 10 continuous attacks dealing 10 damage per attack. The enemy cannot attack or move when hit by a single attack)
King – Hard Swing (Deals 80 damage and stuns the enemy for 3 seconds but still can be attacked by the attacker)
Before the showdown start, add an indicator or big sign that a showdown is initiated then show what pieces are involved in the showdown.
Add a 3-second delay before the showdown starts.
Add indicator that a round is finished and who won.
Mana will reset to 0 every showdown. It should not be retained.
Horses – Dash (Increase movement speed and jump height by 75% for 5 seconds)
Bishops – Blessing (Restore 30% of the total hp of the piece)
Queens – Barrage (Launch 5 continuous attacks dealing 10 damage per attack. The enemy cannot attack or move when hit by a single attack)
Mana will only reset to 0 every start showdown, not every start of round.
If a powerup was collected that includes selection of pieces (e.g., Smash), the player should select first and use the powerup before a move is done.

Every showdown, both pieces will start with full hp. After the showdown, the life will be disabled and will be activated again during showdown. It removes the retaining of hp remaining after a showdown.
Fix the UI for the bishop during showdown where the headgear is cropped out.

Instead of slight pause when a critical damage occurs, show a big bold text in red color indicating that a critical damage occurs. Also change the color fo the piece who received the critical damage into a red for a moment then return to original color to show that the piece received the critical damage.
Improve UI of the board with a little bit of 3D elements like the picture attached below:
Improve the UI and fighting animations during showdown like the picture attached below. Convert them into a bold stickman:
